description: Places child content at a specific native WPF Grid row and column.

row.description: Zero-based target row index in the parent grid.

column.description: Zero-based target column index in the parent grid.

rowSpan.description: Number of consecutive rows occupied by this cell.

columnSpan.description: Number of consecutive columns occupied by this cell.

margin.description: Outer WPF Thickness applied around the cell content.

horizontalAlignment.description: Horizontal placement of the cell content within its allocated area.

verticalAlignment.description: Vertical placement of the cell content within its allocated area.

content.description: Child elements placed at this cell's row, column, and span.
